description_long: This frying pan features a round, shallow cooking surface with slightly sloped sides and a flat base, ideal for frying and sautéing. The pan is predominantly black, suggesting a cast iron or heavy-duty metal construction, and has a robust, straight handle attached with a visible rivet. The handle includes a lighter-colored grip section, possibly made of a different material for heat resistance, and ends with a rectangular cutout for hanging. The rim of the pan is straight and moderately thick, with no visible pouring spouts or reinforced edges. The bottom of the pan appears smooth and unadorned, lacking any visible branding or textured patterns. Overall, the pan is utilitarian and sturdy, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban cooking scenarios.
description: A sturdy black frying pan with a straight handle featuring a lighter grip section and a smooth, flat base. The pan has a simple, utilitarian design with no visible branding or decorative features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight handle with a lighter grip section and the shallow, round pan body.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the attachment of the handle to the pan and the rectangular hanging hole at the handle's end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the pan's circular shape and the handle extending outward, with the grip section visible.
description_view_3: Perspective from the handle end, clearly showing the rectangular hanging hole and the pan's open cooking surface.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight handle made of metal with a lighter-colored, likely plastic, grip section; features a rectangular hanging hole and no visible ergonomic or detachable elements.
attribute_rim_design: Straight, moderately thick rim with no flaring, pouring spouts, or reinforced edges; simple and functional.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Smooth and unadorned bottom surface with no visible patterns, ridges, or brand markings.
